cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees consistently praise the company for offering competitive salaries and solid benefits packages.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Feedback indicates significant concerns regarding a toxic work environment, characterized by fear and internal competition.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members report difficulty balancing professional demands with personal life, often citing long hours and inflexible expectations.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: While some employees value the opportunities for career advancement, others feel their contributions are overlooked or that growth is stagnant.
